config.bender: The bender command (used when Bender.yml exists in the workspace root).
config.benderArgs: Extra arguments for `bender script flist` (e.g. "-t rtl").
config.configFile: Path to the QuickUVM configuration (default: the first *.quickuvm.yaml in the workspace).
config.debounceMs: Delay (ms) between saving an SV file and re-running the backend.
config.fileList: Path to a .f source file list (fallback when there is no Bender.yml).
config.hoverCrossProbe: Hovering a pin in the diagram briefly highlights its declaration in already-visible editors (never opens tabs or steals focus).
config.labelThreshold: Fan-out above which a net is drawn as a label instead of a wire.
config.lassoMode: What the selection lasso picks up.
config.schematicDecorations: Show the schematic drawing vocabulary: bus width labels (/N), slashes, and junction dots. Wire thickness grading stays either way.
config.lassoMode.contain: Only objects fully inside the rectangle (window selection).
config.lassoMode.intersect: Also objects the rectangle merely touches (crossing selection).
config.layoutFile: Path of the layout sidecar file (default: .vscode/quickuvm-architect.yaml, relative to the workspace root).
config.outputDir: Output directory for quick-uvm generate (relative to the workspace root; excluded from the source glob).
config.python: Python command used for the semantic backend (svmodel).
config.quickUvm: The quick-uvm command; if missing from PATH, it is retried through quickuvm.python (-c).
config.seqItemStyle: seq_item_style for agents created by the extension (docs/03: global trans_style).
config.sourceGlob: Source glob used when neither Bender.yml nor a .f file list exists.
config.top: Top module name for elaboration (required; prompted on first run if missing).
description: Visualize SystemVerilog designs as interactive diagrams and generate the QuickUVM testbench YAML configuration by selecting on the diagram.
view.hierarchy.name: Design Hierarchy
view.properties.name: Properties
